_comment: Audited legacy inline fallbacks for declared .env keys. check-env-failfast.py fails on any unclassified new fallback and on stale waiver rows. Shrink this list when converting legacy sites to strict env loaders.

waivers.reason: bootstrap/root discovery boundary: cannot require .env before locating repo root
